description: Audience and workflow metadata for bundled Project Governor skills. This catalog does not replace skills/<skill>/SKILL.md; it controls documentation grouping and drift checks.

visibility_values.workflow: Specific user-facing workflow for a known job.
visibility_values.internal: Normally invoked by orchestrators, routers, or quality gates.
visibility_values.advanced: Specialist diagnostic, review, or retrospective entry point.
visibility_values.deprecated: Kept for compatibility; do not recommend for new workflows.

consolidation_groups.name: initialization-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README exposes one initialization row while preserving separate empty and existing project workflows.

consolidation_groups.name: maintenance-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README exposes one maintenance row for routine install, refresh, and migration work; diagnostics remain advanced tools.

consolidation_groups.name: evidence-upgrade-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README exposes one evidence and upgrade row; version-researcher remains a specialized advanced release research tool.

consolidation_groups.name: design-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README keeps DESIGN.md governance as the main design entrypoint and lists the aesthetic UI gate as an advanced tool.

consolidation_groups.name: memory-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README keeps memory compaction as the routine entrypoint and lists release retrospectives as advanced.

consolidation_groups.name: quality-entrypoint
consolidation_groups.resolution: README keeps quality-gate as the routine completion gate while drift checks, route guard, repair, and merge readiness remain facets.

skills.name: gpt55-auto-orchestrator
skills.summary: Recommended default entry point that selects route, model plan, context budget, subagents, and gates.

skills.name: init-empty-project
skills.summary: Initialize governance files before application code exists.

skills.name: init-existing-project
skills.summary: Initialize governance for an existing repository without changing application code.

skills.name: clean-reinstall-manager
skills.summary: Install, update, reinstall, discover, or refresh Project Governor governance safely.

skills.name: plugin-upgrade-migrator
skills.summary: Plan safe Project Governor version migrations while preserving project customizations.

skills.name: project-hygiene-doctor
skills.summary: Detect plugin-global assets that were copied into target projects.

skills.name: harness-doctor
skills.summary: Diagnose Harness install shape, context freshness, state files, evidence gates, and script readiness.

skills.name: research-radar
skills.summary: Research candidate capabilities or ecosystem changes before adoption.

skills.name: version-researcher
skills.summary: Research release versions, skipped versions, evidence quality, relevance, and risk before upgrade advice.

skills.name: upgrade-advisor
skills.summary: Provide upgrade choices before dependency, tool, SDK, or governance asset changes.

skills.name: design-md-governor
skills.summary: Adopt, lint, summarize, or diff DESIGN.md as an opt-in design-system source.

skills.name: design-md-aesthetic-governor
skills.summary: Specialized UI/frontend gate with DESIGN.md read proof, token discipline, aesthetic review, and drift checks.

skills.name: task-router
skills.summary: Classify requests into route, lane, quality level, change budget, and downstream skills.

skills.name: subagent-activation
skills.summary: Select project-scoped subagents and model strategy for downstream workflows.

skills.name: context-indexer
skills.summary: Build and query compact project context, docs manifest, section retrieval, and governed memory search.

skills.name: context-pack-builder
skills.summary: Build task-specific context packs with must-read files, sections, tests, docs, and budgets.

skills.name: convention-miner
skills.summary: Read-only convention mining for stack, structure, style, APIs, tests, and components.

skills.name: iteration-planner
skills.summary: Plan non-trivial work as an iteration on existing patterns before implementation.

skills.name: pattern-reuse-engine
skills.summary: Find reusable components, services, hooks, schemas, tests, and styles before creating new patterns.

skills.name: test-first-synthesizer
skills.summary: Create targeted test plans or skeletons before behavior changes.

skills.name: parallel-feature-builder
skills.summary: Coordinate the quality-gated implementation pipeline with read-only analysis, writing, tests, review, and repair.

skills.name: implementation-guard
skills.summary: Check minimality, rewrite risk, new file justification, dependencies, duplicate patterns, and public contract drift.

skills.name: route-guard
skills.summary: Verify the actual diff still fits the route selected by task-router.

skills.name: engineering-standards-governor
skills.summary: Scan source size, function complexity, mock leakage, test assertions, and reuse-first compliance before quality-gate completion.

skills.name: quality-gate
skills.summary: Run tiered task completion checks across budget, route guard, evidence, commands, tests, drift, docs, and memory.

skills.name: repair-loop
skills.summary: Repair failed quality checks within the approved scope.

skills.name: merge-readiness
skills.summary: Decide whether quality gate, evidence, docs, memory, approvals, and repairs are ready for merge.

skills.name: style-drift-check
skills.summary: Detect UI, component, naming, formatting, token, layout, and visual style drift.

skills.name: architecture-drift-check
skills.summary: Detect module boundary, import direction, API contract, and data-model drift.

skills.name: pr-governance-review
skills.summary: Run multi-dimension branch governance review before or during PR review.

skills.name: session-lifecycle
skills.summary: Maintain task session state, progress logs, collision metadata, and evidence handoff.

skills.name: evidence-manifest
skills.summary: Create and validate evidence manifests that map criteria, tests, reviews, and docs refresh decisions.

skills.name: memory-compact
skills.summary: Compact recent activity into durable project memory, repeated mistakes, risks, and command learnings.

skills.name: release-retro
skills.summary: Summarize release learning into retrospectives, memory, decisions, questions, and risks.

skills.name: coding-velocity-report
skills.summary: Measure task velocity without rewarding large patches, skipped gates, or poor repairs.
